rationale: The 'notion' style tile shows a coherent token system with a harmonious pastel-plus-navy palette, a clear type hierarchy (80/56/32/24) and a consistent spacing/radius scale, all faithfully echoing Notion's editorial design language via the deep navy hero, purple pill CTA, and tinted cards. Palette swatches, typography scale, and button/card components are all rendered with visible evidence and no hard-fail concerns, making it a complete presentation foundation.
